decisions: 2026-03-20: 2 PRDs — repository settings (per-repo table + interactions) and global settings (AI, defaults, notifications, schedule)
2026-03-20: Plugin display name = auto-derived from GitHub repo name (formatted), override available per repo
2026-03-20: One active AI provider at a time for v1, no fallback chain
2026-03-20: Post defaults (category, tags, status) are per-repo with global fallback
2026-03-20: No global Run Now button — per-repo Generate Draft Now only (covered in release monitoring PRD)
2026-03-20: WP.org slug validated against WP.org API at save time
2026-03-20: API keys encrypted at rest using libsodium (per tech spec)
